glosses.zh-Hans: 资产阶级的; 中产阶级的
glosses.yue: 資產階級嘅; 中產階級嘅
glosses.ja: ブルジョワ; 中産階級の

sentences.target: Il se prend pour un bourgeois.

translations.fr: Il se prend pour un bourgeois.
translations.de: Er hält sich für einen Bourgeois.
translations.zh-Hans: 他觉得自己是个中产阶级的人。
translations.pt: Ele acha que é um burguês.
translations.vi: Anh ấy nghĩ mình là người trung lưu.
translations.nl: Hij denkt dat hij welgesteld is.
translations.hu: Úgy hiszi, hogy ő egy burzsoá.
translations.hi: वह खुद को बुर्जुआ समझता है।
translations.sv: Han tror att han är välbärgad.
translations.ja: 彼は自分をブルジョワだと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine; acts as the subject of the verb.
Reflexive clitic pronoun; marks the pronominal construction 'se prendre' (to consider oneself).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; with 'se' and 'pour' forms the idiom 'se prendre pour'.
Preposition introducing the predicate nominal in the idiom 'se prendre pour X'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'bourgeois'.
Common noun; here masculine singular as indicated by 'un'. Predicate nominal of the construction.

sentences.target: On a croisé un bourgeois au marché.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a kʁwaze œ̃ buʁʒwa o maʁʃe/

translations.fr: On a croisé un bourgeois au marché.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a kʁwaze œ̃ buʁʒwa o maʁʃe/
translations.en: We bumped into a bourgeois at the market.
translations.es: Nos cruzamos con un burgués en el mercado.
translations.de: Wir sind auf dem Markt einem Bourgeois begegnet.
translations.it: Abbiamo incontrato un borghese al mercato.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在市场上遇到了一位中产阶级的人。
translations.yue: 我哋喺街市遇到咗一個中產。
translations.ru: Мы на рынке встретили одного буржуа.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tình cờ gặp một người trung lưu ở chợ.
translations.nl: We kwamen op de markt een welgestelde tegen.
translations.uk: Ми на ринку зустріли одного буржуа.
translations.hi: हम बाज़ार में एक बुर्जुआ से मिले।
translations.pl: Natknęliśmy się na burżuja na targu.
translations.nb: Vi traff en velstående på markedet.
translations.id: Kami bertemu seorang borjuis di pasar.
translations.sv: Vi stötte på en välbärgad person på marknaden.
translations.ro: Am dat peste un burghez la piață.
translations.cs: Na trhu jsme narazili na jednoho buržousta.
translations.da: Vi stødte på en velstillet person på markedet.
translations.ja: 市場でブルジョワに出くわした。

tokens.explanation: Subject impersonal/personal pronoun often used for 'we'; 3rd person singular form.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the compound past with the participle.
Past participle of the main verb; completes the passé composé with 'a'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'bourgeois'.
Common noun; masculine singular as indicated by 'un'; direct object of 'a croisé'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces the location.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Les bourgeois dépensent beaucoup dans ce resto.
sentences.reading: /le buʁʒwa depɑ̃s boku dɑ̃ sə ʁɛsto/

translations.fr: Les bourgeois dépensent beaucoup dans ce resto.
translations.ipa: /le buʁʒwa depɑ̃s boku dɑ̃ sə ʁɛsto/
translations.en: Bourgeois people spend a lot at this restaurant.
translations.es: Los burgueses gastan mucho en este restaurante.
translations.de: Die Bourgeois geben in diesem Restaurant viel aus.
translations.it: I borghesi spendono molto in questo ristorante.
translations.ko: 부르주아들은 이 식당에서 돈을 많이 쓴다.
translations.zh-Hans: 中产在这家餐厅花很多钱。
translations.yue: 中產喺呢間餐廳花好多錢。
translations.ru: Буржуа тратят в этом ресторане много денег.
translations.pt: Os burgueses gastam muito neste restaurante.
translations.he: הבורגנים מוציאים הרבה כסף במסעדה הזאת.
translations.tr: Burjuvalar bu restoranda çok para harcıyor.
translations.vi: Giới trung lưu tiêu rất nhiều ở nhà hàng này.
translations.ar: البرجوازيون ينفقون كثيرا في هذا المطعم.
translations.nl: Welgestelden geben veel uit in dit restaurant.
translations.uk: Буржуа багато витрачають у цьому ресторані.
translations.hu: A burzsoák sokat költenek ebben az étteremben.
translations.hi: बुर्जुआ लोग इस रेस्तरां में बहुत खर्च करते हैं।
translations.pl: Burżuje wydają dużo w tej restauracji.
translations.el: Οι αστοί ξοδεύουν πολλά σε αυτό το εστιατόριο.
translations.nb: Velstående folk bruker mye penger på denne restauranten.
translations.id: Kaum borjuis menghabiskan banyak uang di restoran ini.
translations.sv: Välbärgade spenderar mycket på den här restaurangen.
translations.ro: Burghezii cheltuiesc mult la acest restaurant.
translations.cs: Buržousti utrácejí v této restauraci hodně peněz.
translations.da: Velstillede bruger mange penge på denne restaurant.
translations.fi: Porvarit käyttävät paljon rahaa tässä ravintolassa.
translations.ja: ブルジョワはこのレストランでたくさんお金を使う。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner for 'bourgeois'.
Common noun, masculine plural here; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Adverb of quantity modifying the verb 'dépensent'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'resto'.
Colloquial common noun for 'restaurant'; masculine singular; object of 'dans'.

translations.zh-Hans: 我叔叔是个中产阶级的人。
translations.vi: Chú tôi là người trung lưu.
translations.ja: 私のおじはブルジョワだ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular before the noun 'oncle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'bourgeois'.
Common noun; predicate nominal identifying the subject.
